allow: Bash(sed -i 's|Ligar Agora|📞 \(11\) 4127-8053|g' /c/SiteGraficaCd/index.html)
Bash(sed -i 's|<form class="contact-form" onsubmit="handleSubmit\(event\)">|<form class="contact-form" onsubmit="handleSubmit\(event\)" id="contactForm">|g' /c/SiteGraficaCd/index.html)
Bash(sed -i 's|<input type="text" placeholder="Seu nome">|<input type="text" name="nome" placeholder="Seu nome" required>|g' /c/SiteGraficaCd/index.html)
Bash(sed -i 's|<input type="tel" placeholder="\(11\) 00000-0000">|<input type="tel" name="telefone" placeholder="\(11\) 00000-0000">|g' /c/SiteGraficaCd/index.html)
Bash(sed -i 's|<input type="email" placeholder="seu@email.com">|<input type="email" name="email" placeholder="seu@email.com" required>|g' /c/SiteGraficaCd/index.html)
